name: Pump Components
rationale: Existing ZOLLERN market. Positive displacement pump segment (gear/screw/vane) is USD 20.8B (2025). ZOLLERN wins 14/25 needs (dimensional precision, hardness control, traceability) but net weighted delta -98. Crescent insert profiles = highest differentiation position. BAR stock is dominant incumbent.
entryStrategy: Reference only - existing market. Prioritize crescent insert profiles (highest differentiation), then gear rotor profiles.
